name: github-pr-comment-resolution
description: Help resolve GitHub pull request review comments using the GitHub CLI (`gh`).

interface.shortDescription: Help resolve GitHub pull request review comments using the GitHub CLI (`gh`). Use when the user asks to address, resolve, or summarize PR co
interface.longDescription: Help resolve GitHub pull request review comments using the GitHub CLI (`gh`). Use when the user asks to address, resolve, or summarize PR comments, update code accordingly, and optionally draft or post replies back to GitHub.
